However, at [106], Mike fabricates a statement, claiming that Mitchell admitted to being the only werewolf ('Mitchell was just like, well, I'm the only werewolf'), which never occurred in the transcript. This fabrication, combined with his aggressive framing of Mitchell, strongly suggests that Mike is the Werewolf lying about his role to eliminate another player.
